description: You are a digital infographic designer for a science magazine, preparing a 5th-anniversary retrospective on the Suez Canal blockage. Simulate the view from the Suez Canal (30.0176° N, 32.5802° E, 0 m) on March 29, 2021, at 03:45:00 UTC. Configure the display with the atmosphere disabled, ground enabled, azimuthal coordinate grid visible, and cardinal direction points active. Capture centered screenshots of both the Sun and the Moon to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Create a reference text file at /home/ga/Desktop/suez_syzygy_notes.txt containing the location "Suez", the date "March 29, 2021", mentions of the "Sun" and "Moon", and the term "syzygy" or "spring tide".
